title: Gung-Ho Gopher
description: Gung-Ho Gopher teaches kids about the great outdoors and the importance of survival skills.
quote: Only a Dingaling Duck goes into the wild unprepared.
altHero: Gung-Ho Gopher rope swinging into a canyon to save a wild cat
alt3: Gung-Ho Gopher in a life vest near a river
alt4: Gung-Ho Gopher next to a wild goat
